ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-21-2025 Continued To Jul-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Meeghan Buckley, Esq., for Rose Licata, Executor.

At the outset, counsel offers an update regarding the Estate and Inventory and Appraisal, advising that the lone asset is an account with Robinhood. After additional discussion, including counsel being reminded of probate code 12200, the matter is continued to Jul-21-2025 at 9:00 am. Counsel is reminded that the court will be expecting either a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Status of Administration to be filed by the next calling.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-10-2025 Continued To Apr-21-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-28-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Meeghan Bucley, Esq., for Rose Licata, Petitioner.

The court states that it set this matter for hearing to confirm whether there would be an appearance to object. The court recognizes that the decedent clearly intended the instrument to be his will and therefore should be admitted as such under probate code 6110(c)(2). The court confirms that there are no appearances to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jun-10-2023 is admitted to probate. Rose Licata is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Mar-10-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
